query:
UPDATE marketOverview SET 
  residentialStudioPct = 14.00,
  residential1brPct = 36.00,
  residential2brPct = 30.00,
  residential3brPct = 20.00,
  retailSmallPct = 50.00
WHERE projectId = 4 AND residentialStudioPct < 1;
